_comment: Doc-type × vertical matrix for programmatic SEO. The generator emits /use-cases/<doc-slug>/<vertical-slug>/ landing pages. Edit this file and run scripts/build-use-cases.mjs to regenerate.

docTypes.name: NDA
docTypes.description: A non-disclosure agreement is a legally binding contract that establishes confidential information cannot be shared with third parties without consent.
docTypes.fields: name, company, date, signature, witness signature

docTypes.name: MSA
docTypes.description: A master services agreement is the umbrella contract that defines the legal terms between a service provider and a client across all engagements.
docTypes.fields: company name, signing party, effective date, signature, initials at every page

docTypes.name: employment agreement
docTypes.description: An employment agreement defines the working relationship between an employer and an employee, covering compensation, scope, and confidentiality.
docTypes.fields: employee name, start date, compensation, signature, signature date

docTypes.name: contractor agreement
docTypes.description: An independent contractor agreement spells out the scope, payment terms, and IP ownership for a 1099 working relationship.
docTypes.fields: contractor name, project scope, fee, payment terms, signature, date

docTypes.name: rental lease
docTypes.description: A residential rental lease is the binding agreement between landlord and tenant covering rent, security deposit, term, and use of the property.
docTypes.fields: tenant name, landlord name, property address, rent amount, term, signature, witness signature

docTypes.name: photography contract
docTypes.description: A photography contract sets out shoot details, deliverables, payment, and image-licensing rights between photographer and client.
docTypes.fields: client name, shoot date, deliverables, fee, signature

docTypes.name: model release
docTypes.description: A model release grants the photographer or studio the right to use a subject's likeness in marketing, editorial, or commercial work.
docTypes.fields: subject name, date, signature, parent or guardian signature if minor

docTypes.name: freelance contract
docTypes.description: A freelance contract defines scope, deadlines, payment, and revisions between an independent freelancer and a client.
docTypes.fields: client name, project description, fee, milestones, signature, date

docTypes.name: coaching agreement
docTypes.description: A coaching agreement establishes the engagement terms between a coach and a client, including frequency, fees, and cancellation policy.
docTypes.fields: client name, coach name, package, fee, term, signature, signature date

docTypes.name: consulting agreement
docTypes.description: A consulting agreement governs the relationship between a consultant and a client, defining deliverables, IP, and compensation.
docTypes.fields: consultant name, client name, scope, fee structure, signature, date

verticals.name: freelancers
verticals.audienceLine: You bill by the project. Every minute spent dragging fields into a contract is unbilled time you could be working on the next gig.

verticals.name: consultants
verticals.audienceLine: Your engagements are high-trust, high-stakes, and frequent. Clients need to sign yesterday and you need an audit trail tomorrow.

verticals.name: coaches
verticals.audienceLine: Onboarding a new client should take five minutes, not fifty. The intake forms, the agreement, the cancellation policy — all on the same device, same session.

verticals.name: photographers
verticals.audienceLine: Between shoots, edits, and client management, the last thing you need is a signature tool that fights you. The shoot starts on time when the paperwork is already signed.

verticals.name: startups
verticals.audienceLine: Speed is the only moat. Contractor agreements, NDAs, advisor agreements — same templates, every time, signed without friction.

verticals.name: real estate agents
verticals.audienceLine: Closings hinge on speed and accuracy. A signature platform that finds every field across a 40-page lease is the difference between a Friday close and a Monday escalation.

verticals.name: agencies
verticals.audienceLine: You sign a hundred contracts a month across clients, contractors, and partners. The detection step alone reclaims days a year.

verticals.name: lawyers
verticals.audienceLine: Engagement letters, NDAs, retainer agreements — every page needs initials, every signature needs an audit certificate. Detection that does the placement makes intake feel like the rest of your practice.
